sp_widget.css: /* No CSS here. Add via Tasker Theme */
sp_widget.description: 2.7.0 Create a new widget for delete task modal popup, based off of widget Tasker Modal - Task Cancellation Comment. 2.7.0 | 2021-08-29 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal 2.7.0 | 2021-09-03 | mmcc | DFCT0010476 - "Acknowledgement Prompt" does not have an "Acknowledge" button so users cannot use Tasker 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP)
sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - Delete Task
sp_widget.template:
{{data.msgWarning}}!

{{data.taskNumberShortDescription}}
{{data.msgPermanentlyDelete}}

{{data.msgSubTasksAlsoDeleted}}
